short_description: Published parameters plus digitised official catch, CPUE and age-composition figures for transparent Omega stress testing.
source: Western Australian Department of Primary Industries and Regional Development
recommended_first_action: Read README.md and review parameter_register.csv evidence_class before fitting.
validation_checks: 2024 digitised retained catch 136.4 t agrees within 5 t of published 137 t
Primary daily CPUE composite is normalised to 1.0 in 2008
All area age compositions sum to 1.0
All pooled age compositions sum to 1.0
All available area catch components reconcile to annual sector totals
Every annual retained-catch total equals commercial + charter + recreational components
Digitised Figure 3.21 terminal WCB relative spawning biomass is 0.149, consistent with published 0.15
